falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score drops below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decrease in blowoff score would indicate the market is no longer approaching a blowoff top, invalidating the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna falls below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in pattern similarity below this threshold would suggest the current market dynamics diverge meaningfully from the historical pattern, undermining the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by 10% or more in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move in a major index would directly contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a bullish trend, falsifying the current verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
